notes: Solid Tetris implementation with proper bag randomizer, DAS/ARR, ghost piece, wall kicks, lock delay, and scoring — minor concern with kick table not following standard SRS offsets but overall very playable.
An exceptionally well-crafted Tetris clone with flawless mechanics, proper SRS-like kicks, DAS, lock delay, 7-bag randomizer, ghost piece, and sound effects.

A solid and fully playable Tetris clone with working gravity, rotation, ghost piece, next preview, scoring and line clears, but it lacks hold/system polish and its rotation/kick behavior and hidden-row rendering are not fully authentic.
